title: SaaS Landing Page for Developer Tool
description: A bold modernist design system inspired by exhibition poster aesthetics and technical documentation. Characterized by a high-contrast 'cream and cobalt' color palette, oversized aggressive typography, and a rigid 12-column grid layout with 1px border dividers. This style is ideal for technical SaaS, developer tools, high-end design agencies, or architectural portfolios. Key elements include tight line-heights (0.85), no rounded corners, and a unique vertical labeling system in a dedicated left-hand grid column.
